topics.title: Module Updates
topics.summary: The recent merge of PR #3073 involves a standard bump of the module-replacements to version 3.1.0. This update is part of routine maintenance to ensure compatibility and performance improvements within the project.

topics.title: User Verification
topics.summary: A new verification status has been granted to user @iiro.fi by npmx. This indicates a step towards enhancing user trust and credibility within the npmx community, allowing verified users to stand out.
